title: Think 工具：复杂工具调用中的结构化暂停思考
title_en: Think Tool: Structured Scratchpad for Complex Tool-Use

body.concept: Think 工具是一个特殊的「空白工具」：Claude 在生成回复的过程中，遇到需要推理的节点时，可以调用它写下自己的思考过程。这个思考不会调用外部 API，也不改变任何数据库，只是把推理过程追加到日志里。
body.analogy: 就像数学考试时在草稿纸上列竖式——答案还是你写的，但草稿纸给了你一个不被打断的空间，把复杂步骤拆开算清楚，再写到答题纸上。
body.visual: 工具调用链：[tool_A 返回结果] → [think: 分析结果，检查是否符合政策] → [tool_B] → [think: 确认下一步] → [最终回复]

body_en.concept: The think tool is a special no-op tool: while generating a response, Claude can call it to write out its reasoning at any decision point. It doesn't call any external API or modify any data — it just appends the thought to the log.
body_en.analogy: Like scratch paper during a math exam — the final answer is still yours, but the scratch space lets you work through complex steps without interruption before writing the clean answer.
body_en.visual: Tool call chain: [tool_A result] → [think: analyze result, check policy] → [tool_B] → [think: confirm next step] → [final response]
